title: About us
subtitle: Serving Children, Families and Communities Since 1992.

founder.title: The Founder
founder.subtitle: A Visionary Who Believed Every Child Deserves a Home
description: Prof. G. S. Jayadeva, the founder of Deenabandhu Trust, comes from a distinguished literary family as the son of Rashtrakavi G. S. Shivarudrappa.

With nearly forty years of experience as an educationist and social worker, he dedicated his life to caring for orphaned and underprivileged children while promoting quality education and community development.

His contributions have earned numerous recognitions, including the Mahatma Gandhi Seva Award – Karnataka. He is also the author of several Kannada books on education, child development, environment and social change.

journey.title: Our Journey
journey.subtitle: From Six Children to Thousands of Lives
description: Deenabandhu began in 1992 with only six boys living in a rented house.
Support from generous donors helped build cottages for children and later establish a dedicated home for girls.
The Trust expanded by starting a school from LKG to 10th Standard and later established the Teacher Resource Center promoting experiential learning throughout Karnataka.
Today Deenabandhu impacts thousands of children, teachers and rural communities every year.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To build a compassionate society where every child, irrespective of caste, creed or economic background, enjoys equal opportunities for education, dignity, safety and holistic development.

mission.title: Our Mission
points: Provide loving homes for vulnerable children.
Promote experiential learning through Teacher Resource Centers.
Protect biodiversity and encourage sustainable living.

team.name: Prof. G. S. Jayadeva
team.bio: Founder of Deenabandhu Trust and an educationist with over four decades of experience dedicated to child welfare, education, and community development.

team.name: Managing Trustee
team.bio: Leads the administration and strategic development of Deenabandhu Trust while ensuring quality education and holistic care for children.

team.name: Core Team
team.bio: Coordinates educational programs, Teacher Resource Centre initiatives, scholarships, and community outreach across Karnataka.
